description_long: This object is a short sword with a straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a pointed tip. The blade is metallic gray, appearing solid and unadorned, with a polygonal cross-section that gives it a faceted look. The hilt features a simple, flat crossguard that separates the blade from the handle. The handle is cylindrical, colored in a muted gold or bronze tone, and ends in a rounded pommel. There are no visible engravings, patterns, or decorative elements on any part of the sword. The overall design is utilitarian, suggesting a focus on function over ornamentation.
description: A short, straight, double-edged sword with a faceted metallic blade, simple crossguard, and a cylindrical gold-toned handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the blade, crossguard, and cylindrical handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the round shape of the handle and pommel.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the blade's thinness and the handle's cylindrical form.
